DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are established and used.

MaintenanceNote.Para: If desired, the printer can be deactivated by opening the circuit breaker PRINTER-FLT DK and locking with an INOP tag.

ListItem.Para: Consult with the OCC to arrange alternate delivery method for dispatch documentation as required.
In case of one EFB Inoperative, refer to MEL 46-11-01-01 for (O) procedure.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.

MaintenanceNote.Para: If desired, the printer can be deactivated by opening the circuit breaker PRINTER-FLT DK and locking with an INOP tag.

OperationNote.Para: In case of one EFB inoperative, refer to MEL 46-11-01-01 for (O) procedure.

MaintenanceNote.Para: Miscellaneous features refers to those features, which when inoperative, do not affect the printer’s primary functions. The paper cutter would be an example of a miscellaneous feature.
